narrative:
Westerville 3-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 800 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
